name: MoneyGram
description_short: 1265 Goss Ave: MoneyGram in Louisville, KY provides check cashing, money transfers, and bill payments from 7am to 10pm daily.
description_long:
MoneyGram's standalone branch at 1265 Goss Ave in Louisville, KY is open from 7am to 10pm every day of the week. Located in Louisville, this check-cashing center provides convenient access to money transfer services and bill payment options without the wait times of traditional banks. Residents throughout Louisville rely on this location for quick financial services during their busy schedules.

At this Louisville MoneyGram location, you can cash personal checks, payroll checks, and government checks. The branch also handles domestic and international money transfers to recipients in over 200 countries, as well as bill payment services. For specific questions about rates, transfer limits, or to confirm services, call 502-634-0724 to reach the team at 1265 Goss Ave.

If you're a Louisville resident needing quick check cashing or money transfer services, bring a valid government-issued ID and your documents. This standalone MoneyGram store serves the entire Louisville community with competitive rates and helpful staff. The 1265 Goss Ave location in Louisville provides extended evening hours to accommodate working professionals and others who need after-hours financial services.
pros: 24 confirmed locations across Louisville in established retailers (CVS, Walmart) for maximum accessibility
Extended hours at many locations, including until 11:00 PM at several CVS and Walmart locations
24/7 online transaction capability allowing customers to initiate transfers without visiting physical locations
Both domestic and international money transfer services available
Serves multiple consumer needs including bill payments and money orders beyond basic transfers
Partner locations in neighborhood convenience stores (Lamp Fall Market, Klondike Market) provide local access
Simple search interface to locate nearest service point by address, city, state, or ZIP code
cons: Limited to money transfer services—does not offer banking products like checking or savings accounts
International transfer fees and exchange rates are determined by MoneyGram and can be comparatively high
Dependent on third-party retail partners, meaning hours and service quality vary by location
No direct customer service center; all inquiries routed to (800) 746-7287 for most CVS locations
Requires recipient information and identification for transfers, creating longer transaction times compared to ATM withdrawals
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals who need occasional money transfers without a bank account
People sending remittances internationally to family or business contacts
Customers preferring in-person transactions over purely digital banking platforms
Those needing bill payment options without traditional banking relationships
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who occasionally need to send money domestically or internationally and value in-person service accessibility at neighborhood retail locations. The primary caveat is that MoneyGram is a specialized money transfer service, not a financial institution—it does not provide banking products, and international transfer costs can be substantial relative to alternatives.
services: Domestic money transfers within the United States
International money transfers to recipients outside the U.S.
In-person transfer services at retail partner locations
Location finder by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Walk-in service at CVS, Walmart, and independent retail partners
meta_description: MoneyGram at 1265 Goss Ave, Louisville, KY. Check cashing, bill pay, money transfers open 7am-10pm daily.
